description_long: A serving of golden-brown French fries is presented in a classic, upright red paper sleeve. The fries are irregularly shaped, with some pieces longer and more curved than others, giving a natural, hand-cut appearance. The container is a vibrant red, smooth, and slightly glossy, with no visible branding or text. The fries are loosely piled, some leaning outward, creating a casual and appetizing look. The sleeve is open at the top, allowing the fries to protrude and be easily accessible. No condiments or additional items are visible with the fries.
description: Golden-brown French fries are loosely piled in a smooth, vibrant red paper sleeve with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top of the red sleeve with fries protruding outward, some fries leaning to the left.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the irregular, natural shapes of the fries and the shadowed side of the red sleeve.
description_view_2: Direct rear view with fries appearing more centered and upright, sleeve's red color is prominent.
description_view_3: Side view showing the fries leaning slightly to the right, with the sleeve's side surface visible.
attribute_arrangement_of_fries: The fries are loosely piled within the sleeve, with some pieces leaning outward and overlapping in a casual, natural arrangement.
